v9.0.4, v9.0.3, v9.0.2, v9.0.1 (2023-09-16)

\n
    \n\t

v9.0.0 (2023-09-09)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: added Utils page in the docs with APIs to the utility functions exposed by\n\t\tthe library.
    • \n\t
  • Tooltip was simplified and now the positioning ensures that the tooltip is always visible on the\n\t\tscreen.
    • \n\t
  • Popover will now update its position when the window is resized.
    • \n\t
  • The tip of the Tooltip and Popover will now try to be centered on the target element\n\t\t(if the box was offset from the screen edge).
    • \n\t
  • Improved keyboard focus for notifications: when a notification is dismissed from the keyboard (Escape) the focus\n\t\twill be moved to the next available notification.
    • \n\t
  • Improved & standardised z-index throughout the components.
    • \n\t
  • Tweaked Menu positioning to update on window resize.
    • \n\t
  • Tweaked MenuItem for responsiveness (e.g. add ellipsis if the text is too long).
    • \n
\n

Breaking changes

\n
    \n\t
  • The events property was dropped from the Tooltip, leaving hover and\n\t\tfocus events as the default. For use cases when the click was needed, Popover\n\t\tshould be used instead.\n\t
    • \n\t
  • z-index value of the Popover and Tooltip has been reduced from\n\t\t9999 to 99, so that it's closer to the content it describes. Ideally tooltips\n\t\tshould slide under some other floating elements of the UI (like toolbars or drawers), while remaining above the\n\t\tcontent layer. This can be o overriden in the app's own css if needed.\n\t
    • \n
\n
\n

v8.4.5, v8.4.4 (2023-08-26)

\n
    \n\t
  • Standardise InputSearch UX: clear button and Escape-to-clear behaviour now works the same in\n\t\tdifferent browsers.
    • \n\t
  • Enhance Popover so that it updates its position after it detects a content change.
    • \n\t
  • Expose Popover's updatePosition function.
    • \n\t
  • Tweak the dropdown-align function for popover.
    • \n
\n

v8.4.3 (2023-08-25)

\n
    \n\t
  • Fix InputRadio group block padding.
    • \n
\n

v8.4.2, v8.4.1, v8.4.0 (2023-08-24)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: Popover component. If a Dialog and Tooltip had a\n\t\tchild - this would be it. It's a container that can be opened like a dialog, but will be attached to the\n\t\ttarget element (like a tooltip). It's a great way to display additional information or actions for a\n\t\tspecific element on the page. It can contain other components (e.g. buttons) and can serve as a free-form menu.\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Fix popover above the target styling.
    • \n\t
  • Simplify & refactor Tooltip to share more code with Popover. Styling and core\n\t\tfunctionality is now almost the same, while the UX and usage remains a bit different.
    • \n
\n

v8.3.3 (2023-08-19)

\n
    \n\t
  • Inputs with dropdowns (e.g. Combobox and InputDate) will not trigger page scroll on\n\t\tfocus (in mobile Safari).
    • \n\t
  • Combobox dropdown will now auto-adjust its position when the virtual keyboard opens (in mobile\n\t\tSafari).
    • \n\t
  • :focus has been updated to :focus-visible for non-input elements, for a better look.\n\t
    • \n
\n

v8.3.2 (2023-08-18)

\n
    \n\t
  • Improve InputRadio styling to look more like the rest of the inputs (e.g. checkbox).
    • \n\t
  • Standardise font sizes into css variables: --ui-font-xs=14px, --ui-font-s=15px,\n\t\t--ui-font-m=16px, --ui-font-l=17px, --ui-font-xl=22px\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Correct the symbol for Return (⏎) in Menu.
    • \n\t
  • Menu can now be centered with the target button (using align attribute).
    • \n\t
  • Context Menu will now open above the long-pressed spot on mobile (by default).
    • \n\t
  • Pressing the same letter key, with the Menu open will now cycle through the items starting with\n\t\tthat letter.
    • \n\t
  • Pressing space with the Menu open, while typing something quickly, will not trigger the click event\n\t\ton the currently selected item. This allows to type-to-highlight elements that contain space in the text.\n\t\tPressing space standalone (while not typing), will trigger the click event.
    • \n
\n

v8.3.1 (2023-08-14)

\n
    \n\t
  • Removed --ui-margin-xl and --ui-margin-xxl as they were not used.
    • \n\t
  • Merged --ui-border-radius-s with --ui-border-radius and changed to a rem value that\n\t\tcalculates to the whole pixel (so that browsers would render it better).
    • \n\t
  • Fixed the NotificationCenter issue, where toasts would not close if navigated away from the page\n\t\tthat initialises the component.
    • \n\t
  • Tweaked dialog border-radius to render a bit better (for dialog's header and footer).
    • \n\t
  • Aligned components heights (Menu, Combobox, and InputRadio items).
    • \n\t
  • Fixed Menu's longpress event to not triger when moving the finger (touchmove should stop\n\t\tlongpress).
    • \n\t
  • Improve navigation swipe event (swiping can now be triggered by any element that is not scrollable and has no\n\t\tscrollable ancestors).
    • \n\t
  • Increased Menu font size slightly, while decreasing it for everything (102% -> 100% on\n\t\tbody).\n\t
    • \n
\n

v8.3.0 (2023-08-11)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: InputSearch component. Not much more than InputText, except the\n\t\tsearch icon and (depending on the browser) - the clear button.
    • \n\t
  • Fixed a weird and edge-case issue with Menu on mobile Safari (#119).
    • \n
\n

v8.2.0 (2023-08-08)

\n
    \n\t
  • data attribute in Combobox is deprecated. It will be removed in the next major\n\t\tversion. Use items instead.
    • \n\t
  • Combobox and Menu now use the same align function (for consistency and performance)\n\t\tand there's no need to add elevate attribute to either of them, as both popups are rendered\n\t\tinside the body element and are only added to the DOM, when they are opened (to avoid polluting the\n\t\tDOM with unnecessary elements).
    • \n
\n

v8.1.4 (2023-07-31)

\n
    \n\t
  • Improved PushButton pressed styling.
    • \n\t
  • Some buttons should now react faster on mobile (touch-action added to notification buttons and all inputs,\n\t\tselects and textareas).
    • \n
\n

v8.1.3 (2023-07-30)

\n
    \n\t
  • PushButton now has better contrast (when pressed).
    • \n\t
  • Fixed showMessage style for long messages on mobile.
    • \n\t
  • Fixed password strength popup style.
    • \n\t
  • Docs: fancy font should be applied do docs only, not to the components.
    • \n\t
  • Docs: try swipeRight on mobile to open sidebar.
    • \n\t
  • Added touch-action: manipulation to Label and some other missing places.
    • \n
\n

v8.1.2 (2023-07-29)

\n
    \n\t
  • Small table style tweaks
    • \n\t
  • Docs improvements
    • \n
\n

v8.1.1 (2023-07-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • Bring back --ui-color-accent-semi and --ui-color-highlight-semi colors.
    • \n\t
  • Combobox and InputDate buttons should not be tabbable.
    • \n\t
  • Combobox and InputDate buttons should toggle the dropdown on click.
    • \n
\n

v8.1.0 (2023-07-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: All inputs have a new attribute labelOnTheLeft which allows to move the label\n\t\tto the left of the input.
    • \n
\n

v8.0.1 (2023-07-26)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: Check the platform on load and add a mobile or desktop class to\n\t\tthe html element.
    • \n\t
  • Fixed: Menu separator is now aligned with menu items.
    • \n\t
  • Fixed: Notifications Archive "Clear all" button is now back to normal.
    • \n
\n

v8.0.0 (2023-07-25)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: Label component.
    • \n\t
  • New icons: sun and moon for the dark-theme switchers.
    • \n\t
  • Improvement: info, error and label attributes are now\n\t\tsupported on other inputs (Combobox, InputDate, Select,\n\t\tButtonToggle, and Toggle).\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Improvement: all components now expose element and inputElement (if\n\t\tthere is one (and only one)). The exceptions are NotificationCenter and MessageBox,\n\t\tdue to their implementation.
    • \n\t
  • Added title attribute to ButtonToggle.
    • \n\t
  • Added success type for MessageBox.
    • \n\t
  • Fixed selectable=false not working on Table.
    • \n\t
  • Improved styling for Dialog and MessageBox.
    • \n
\n

Breaking changes

\n
    \n\t
  • Color palette has been completely revamped for better accessibility (more contrast), consistency and simplicity\n\t\t(fewer colors and css variables).
    • \n\t
  • Autocomplete has been renamed to Combobox as this is what it really is.
    • \n\t
  • Datepicker has been renamed to InputDate.
    • \n\t
  • Toaster component has been removed. Use NotificationCenter instead.
    • \n\t
  • Select - HTML structure has changed: .select-wrap select -->\n\t\t.select .input-inner .input-row select\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Table - CSS classes have changed from .table-wrapper table.table -->\n\t\t.table table\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Toggle - HTML structure has changed from .toggle .toggle-inner .toggle-scroller input\n\t\t--> .toggle .toggle-inner .toggle-label .toggle-scroller input
    • \n\t
  • drawBorders attribute has been removed from Dialog, while header and footer styling\n\t\thas been improved for all dialogs.
    • \n\t
  • These components previously exposed _this, which is now called element:\n\t\tButton, Checkbox, InputMath, PushButton, Table\n\t
    • \n
\n

Color palette - mapping from v7 to v8 colors:

\n
    \n\t
  • --ui-color-text-dark-1 --> --ui-color-text-1
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-text-dark-2 --> --ui-color-text-2
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-border-dark-1 --> --ui-color-border-1
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-border-dark-2 --> --ui-color-border-2
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-background-light-2 --> --ui-color-background-1
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-background-dark-2 --> --ui-color-background-2
    • \n\t
  • --ui-color-highlight-dark-2 --> --ui-color-highlight-1
    • \n
\n

Other (not mentioned above) color variations, (i.e. -light- and -dark-) have been removed.\n

\n
\n

v7.0.2 (2023-06-29)

v7.0.1 (2023-06-28)

\n
    \n\t

v7.0.0 (2023-06-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: InfoBar component.
    • \n\t
  • New: InputText, InputNumber, and Radio components.
    • \n\t
  • New: info, error and label attributes are now supported\n\t\ton all basic inputs (InputText, InputNumber, InputMath,\n\t\tInputPassword, Radio, and Checkbox).\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Improved: InputMath component: support for () characters, to allow\n\t\tfor more complex expressions.
    • \n
\n

Breaking changes

\n

Checkbox

\n
    \n\t
  • HTML structure changed input --> .checkbox .checkbox-row input
    • \n\t
  • on:change is called with a svelte event instead of the native one, so:\n\t\te.target.checked is now e.detail.checked\n\t
    • \n
\n

InputMath

\n
    \n\t
  • HTML structure changed .input-math-wrapper input -->\n\t\t.input-math .input-inner .input-math-row input\n\t
    • \n
\n

InputNumber:

\n
    \n\t
  • HTML structure changed: input --> .input-number .input-inner input
    • \n
\n

InputPassword

\n
    \n\t
  • HTML structure changed: .input-password-wrapper .input-password-row input -->\n\t\t.input-password .input-inner .input-password-row input\n\t
    • \n
\n

CSS variables changed:

\n
    \n\t
  • --ui-shadow-invalid --> --ui-shadow-danger
    • \n
\n
\n

v6.8.0 (2023-06-17)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: MessageBox component for displaying quick info/warning/error messages or\n\t\tconfirmation dialogs (replacement for browser's native alert and confirm).

v6.7.1 (2023-06-13)

\n
    \n\t

v6.7.0 (2023-06-13)

\n
    \n\t
  • New: NotificationCenter component. This will eventually replace\n\t\tToaster, as it's more accessible and powerful.\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Toaster component is now deprecated and will be removed in the next major version.\n\t
    • \n\t
  • PushButton changes:
      \n\t\t\t
    • remove link and text types, as they don't make sense (pushed state would\n\t\t\t\tnot be visible).
      • \n\t\t\t
    • fix outline type styling.
      • \n\t\t\t
    • update the event passed to the on:change callback (rename property from\n\t\t\t\tevent.detail.value to event.detail.pressed).\n\t\t\t
      • \n\t\t\t
    • fix PushButton keyboard events (pressing Space or Enter would not trigger the\n\t\t\t\ton:change event).\n\t\t\t
      • \n\t\t
    \n\t
    • \n

v6.6.8 (2023-06-07)

\n
    \n\t
  • Menu improvements:
      \n\t\t\t
    • aria-expanded attribute was incorrectly being added to the body on menu open\n\t\t\t\t(apart from the target button).
      • \n\t\t\t
    • Tabbing does not move focus out of the menu anymore (it will cycle through the menu items).
      • \n\t\t\t
    • simplify html structure (ul -> menu, li/button ->\n\t\t\t\tbutton)\n\t\t\t

    • Make toasts focusable (so that they can be closed with Escape).

v6.6.3, v6.6.2, v6.6.1, v6.6.0, (2023-05-11)

\n
    \n\t
  • Select now also accepts an array of strings for items.
    • \n\t
  • ButtonToggle now also accepts an array of strings for items.
    • \n\t
  • em to rem, as it's more consistent and predictable.
    • \n
\n

v6.5.5, v6.5.4, v6.5.3 (2023-05-09)

\n
    \n\t
  • Standardise button height to match all the other controls.
    • \n\t
  • Standardise placeholder and input-icon colours.
    • \n\t
  • Enhance Autocomplete's and DatePicker's input-icon click experience.
    • \n\t
  • Size the icons in em not px.
    • \n
\n

v6.5.2 (2023-05-08)

\n
    \n\t
  • Maintenance update: upgrade dependencies, remove yet another useless a11y warning from svelte zealots.

\n

v6.5.1 (2023-05-07)

\n
    \n\t
  • Menu highlighting upgrade: ArrowDown on the last item will highlight the first item,\n\t\tArrowUp on the first item will highlight the last item.\n\t
    • \n
\n

v6.5.0 (2023-04-28)

\n
    \n\t

    • \n\t
  • Fix round button (with text) aspect-ratio lock.

\n
    \n\t

  • Autocomplete keyboard scrolling alignment fix (highlighted item was partially cropped).

\n

  • Fix menu.open issue when event was not passed.

v5.0.0 (2023-02-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • Breaking change: renamed props for all components: className -> class (as it turns\n\t\tout it is possible to use class as a prop name in svelte)
    • \n\t
  • Almost all components now have a class prop, which can be used to add custom classes to the\n\t\tcomponent
    • \n\t
  • Updated docs to reflect the above changes
    • \n\t
  • Docs API table is now alphabetically sorted
    • \n\t
  • Components don't use $$props anymore, as it was causing issues with the class\n\t\tprop. Instead, the props are now explicitly passed down to the component. This is a good thing to do, as it\n\t\tmakes the components more explicit and easier to understand.
    • \n
\n
\n

v4.0.0 (2023-02-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • Breaking change: renamed components: Item -> MenuItem, Separator ->\n\t\tMenuSeparator\n\t
    • \n\t
  • Refactored the folder structure
    • \n
\n

\n
    \n\t

v3.1.1 (2023-01-04)

\n
    \n\t

v3.1.0 (2023-01-03)

\n
    \n\t
  • UX change: autocomplete will not close on scroll or resize events from now on (it can be changed using new\n\t\tproperties hideOnScroll and hideOnResize).
    • \n\t
  • fixed: autocomplete issue, where clicking on a filtered list would not select.
    • \n\t
  • tweak: autocomplete will now show "create new item" always (when enabled), not only when the query did\n\t\tnot match anything. Except when the query matches an item exactly.
    • \n
\n

\n
    \n\t

v3.0.0 (2022-12-28)

\n
    \n\t
  • breaking change: cssClass property available on some components has been renamed to\n\t\tclassName (to be more aligned with the standard workaround in other libs/frameworks).\n\t
    • \n\t
  • some components (where possible) are now using $$props to pass-through the properties of the\n\t\tinstance down to the component.
    • \n

v2.1.1 (2022-12-24)

\n
    \n\t
  • breaking change: dist folder has been renamed to docs, as this is the only allowed\n\t\tname for a GH pages folder so that the GH pages is published automatically (without writing a GH action\n\t\tspecifically for this).
